translation.literal_translation: In the inner-controller passage regarding deity and related domains, because of designation of His attributes. (18)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.2.18: antaryamin is Brahman, established by explicit ascription of Brahmanic attributes.
translation.interpretive_note: Sutra encapsulation of the antaryamin determination.

lexical_notes.gloss: inner controller across deity and other domains
lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Sutra situates one controller-function through multiple ontological layers.

lexical_notes.gloss: because of ascription of His attributes
lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Decisive reason clause identifying controller as Brahman by predicate profile.
Compressed form of the full bhashya reasoning on antaryamin identity.

lexical_notes.gloss: identity of Brahman and inner controller
lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Final doctrinal equation secured by attribute evidence across sections.

uncertainty_notes: Curated in contiguous S02 pass with stable cadence and inferential-tag schema.
A later philological pass should revisit antaryamin technical vocabulary and akshi-purusha predicate nuances in records 1.2.040-1.2.046.
